top_signals.title: Anxieties over inflation risk mount ahead of Bank of England rate-setting decision
top_signals.summary: Central bank likely to keep interest rate at 3.75% despite demands for immediate increase
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Ukrainian drone campaign chokes Moscow’s lifeline to Crimea
top_signals.summary: Fuel shortages are plaguing Russian-occupied peninsula that is ‘very easy to capture and very hard to keep’
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Chancellor Rachel Reeves speech at the AI Adoption Summit
top_signals.summary: Chancellor Rachel Reeves has delivered a speech at the AI Adoption Summit.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Failed SpaceX IPO Allocation Prompts Korea to Widen Mirae Review
top_signals.summary: South Korea’s financial watchdog has expanded an inspection of Mirae Asset Securities Co. to examine the brokerage’s failure to secure an allocation of SpaceX shares in the company’s initial public offering, according to people familiar with the matter.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Europe’s Climate Leaders
top_signals.summary: EU climate policy rollback highlights challenge of green transition, with early movers facing uncertainty. Plus: AI promises efficiency gains, but at a cost; and the annual FT-Statista list of companies making progress in cutting carbon emissions
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.summary: Understanding both the ‘sources and uses’ of investible capital will become paramount as competition for funds rises

top_signals.title: BBC news teams to lose hundreds of jobs in radical downsizing
top_signals.summary: Cuts likely to affect specific radio shows as part of corporation plans to reduce costs

top_signals.title: Lessons from Ireland’s Revolut revolution
top_signals.summary: The fintech’s model is proving more suitable for international scaling than the often outdated systems of legacy rivals
